Answer:
decoded_text.generated: GPU warmup distorts token measurements because the initial tokens are consumed by compiling kernels and initializing memory rather than performing actual inference work. This overhead inflates the total token count without contributing to meaningful model output, skewing efficiency metrics. Consequently, the calculated tokens-per-second rate appears artificially low until the hardware reaches its steady-state performance.
